findings.description: Ivyl Phylena Greenley and Kenneth Werner Quass had a second child besides their son Donald: a daughter, Alice Jeannette 'Jeannie' Quass, born 6 December 1940 in Madelia, Minnesota.

target_person.name: Alice Jeannette Quass
target_person.birth: 6 December 1940, Madelia, Watonwan County, Minnesota, United States

supporting_sources: Minnesota, Birth Index, 1935-2002 — entry for Alice Jeanette Quass, born 6 Dec 1940, father Kenneth Warner Quass

findings.description: Alice Jeannette Quass, daughter of Ivyl and Kenneth, died on 3 February 1955 in Madelia, Minnesota, at age 14.
supporting_sources: Minnesota, Death Records and Certificates, 1900-1955 — entry for Alice Jeannette Quass, 3 Feb 1955
Minnesota, Death Index, 1908-2002 — entry for Alice Jeannette Quass, 3 Feb 1955

findings.description: Alice Jeannette Quass was buried on 21 February 1955 in Madelia, Minnesota, near her family.
